Game.Name: Hokuto no Ken 7 - Seiken Retsuden Denshousha e no Michi (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Hokuto no Ken 7: Seiken Retsuden: Denshousha e no Michi ("Fist of the North Star 7: History of the Sacred Fist: The Way of the Successor") is a fighting game featuring characters from the Hokuto no Ken/Fist of the North Star anime/manga franchise. With the exception of a few character switches and updates, the game is similar to its predecessor Hokuto no Ken 6. Hokuto no Ken 7 is not only the last Fist of the North Star game for the Super Famicom, but the last in Toei's numbered series. CharactersKenshiroShinReiShuhSoutherJuzaRaohMr. Heart (unplayable, appears in single player modes)Boss Fang/King of Kiba (unplayable, appears in single player modes)
Game.Notes: Hokuto no Ken 7 : Seiken Retsuden Denshōsha e no Michi (北斗の拳７ 聖拳列伝 伝承者への道?, Fist of the North Star 7: History of the Sacred Fist - The Way of the Successor) is the third and final Hokuto no Ken video game for the Super Famicom in Japan, released on December 24, 1993. It is a fighting game similar to the previous installment, Hokuto no Ken 6, which changes to the game mechanics and character roster.
